control.description-key: Purchase Order editable grid for child records with AG

property.name: controlId
property.description-key: Unique identifier of the control. Needs to match the id of the Attachments control

property.name: status
property.description-key: The status of the main record (PO Header/RFQ Header). OptionSet column binded from the table

property.name: status_edited
property.description-key: The value of the option set as Edited (for PO) or Updating (for RFQ)

property.name: recordStatusLogicalName
property.description-key: The logical name of the Status column used on the record (po: mserp_responsestate, rfq: mserp_replyprogressstatus etc.)

property.name: clearCacheProperty
property.description-key: Logical name of any date field on the line table, used for clearing cache on the portal

property.name: headerSchemaName
property.description-key: The schema name of the Header on the Line (mserp_FK_...)

property.name: searchableColumns
property.description-key: Indicates which columns should be searchable from the Search box on the control (comma separated)

property.name: alternateLineId
property.description-key: Logical name of alternate line id for bundling attachments

property.name: debugMode
property.description-key: When enabled, shows a debug panel with raw field values and locale info. Disable in production.
